dtsPropsFor.Button: /** Visual style. */ variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger'; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode; disabled?: boolean; type?: 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset'; onClick?: React.MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>;
dtsPropsFor.ButtonLink: /** Destination URL. */ href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger'; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.Badge: children: React.ReactNode; /** Color tone. */ tone?: 'neutral' | 'mint' | 'dark' | 'green' | 'amber' | 'red' | 'blue' | 'purple'; className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.DatabaseNotice: /** When true the component renders nothing. */ databaseReady: boolean; error?: string;
dtsPropsFor.PageHeader: title: string; description?: string; /** Right-aligned actions, e.g. a Button. */ action?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.Section: /** Optional heading rendered above the content. */ title?: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.StatCard: label: string; value: string | number; /** Lucide icon component. */ icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>; tone?: 'mint' | 'danger';
dtsPropsFor.Field: /** Field label text. */ label: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.TextInput: className?: string; placeholder?: string; value?: string | number; defaultValue?: string | number; type?: string; name?: string; disabled?: boolean; required?: boolean; onChange?: React.ChangeEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>;
dtsPropsFor.SelectInput: className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode; value?: string; defaultValue?: string; name?: string; disabled?: boolean; onChange?: React.ChangeEventHandler<HTMLSelectElement>;
dtsPropsFor.TextArea: className?: string; placeholder?: string; value?: string; defaultValue?: string; name?: string; rows?: number; disabled?: boolean; onChange?: React.ChangeEventHandler<HTMLTextAreaElement>;
